changelog: 0.4.6 Tuya S6E/S8E support—Mod Store firmware enables Zigbee, rotary knob, quad-mic. UI copy rewritten for clarity, i18n improved. Visual hierarchy optimized—monospace values, better recognition. Browser stabilized—WebView leaks fixed, white-screen resolved. Sendspin overhauled—true ms-grade multi-room sync, -200ms offset deprecated. Legacy mode for <2GB RAM—dynamic bitrate, auto frame reduction. Sensor polling controls—granular intervals extend battery. Proximity streaming added with debounce. Mod Store downloads refactored—checksum verification, rollback on failure. Audio buffer overflow fixed #64 @pvossel—FIFO rewrite, Silence Detection, 40% memory reduction. Assist Satellite Q&A support. Audio Stream Control API exposed—programmatic mic seize/release.
